title: bichea lateritia
intro: Bichea lateritia, also known as Bicchieri or Bichera, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which are used to treat various health conditions. Bichea lateritia has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea, and to alleviate symptoms of fever and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Bichea lateritia include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
